overall.description: A nighttime walk along a beach in GTA V, starting near a lifeguard tower, passing two characters warming themselves by a barrel fire, wading through shallow water past a roller coaster structure, and approaching the illuminated Los Santos beachfront buildings.

events.description: passes the lifeguard tower on the left, continuing toward distant fire

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy beach toward a distant campfire glow on the shore

entered.detail: elevated wooden lifeguard station with stairs and platform
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky along the beachfront
sandy beach surface with scattered debris
distant city buildings and lights visible along the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along a dark beach at night, passing a lifeguard tower on the left while approaching a distant fire. Palm trees line the left side while city lights glimmer on the horizon to the right.

events.description: approaches two characters standing around a burning barrel fire
passes the two characters and continues along the shoreline

entered.detail: metal barrel with bright orange flames providing warmth and light

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches two game characters standing around a burning barrel on the beach. One character drinks from a bottle while the other warms their hands. The fire illuminates the immediate area with orange light against the dark blue night.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow coastal water with amusement pier

events.description: steps from sand into shallow ocean water along the shoreline
large roller coaster structure becomes visible on the right side

large metal roller coaster framework of the Del Perro Pier amusement park

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from sand into shallow ocean water, continuing along the coast. The massive framework of a roller coaster emerges on the right, silhouetted against the night sky as the camera passes by the amusement park structure.

events.description: Los Santos building with illuminated signage becomes prominent on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing through shallow water toward the illuminated Los Santos beachfront buildings

entered.detail: multi-story building with prominent green neon 'Los Santos' signage
various illuminated signs and building lights along the beachfront
vehicles parked along the beachfront road with headlights on

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the urban beachfront, where the illuminated 'Los Santos' building dominates the left side with bright green neon signage. Parked cars with headlights on line the shore as the camera continues wading through the shallow water toward the city lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dark coastline that transitions from a secluded beach into a brightly lit urban waterfront. It begins by walking past a lifeguard tower and palm trees under a night sky, moving toward the distant glow of a fire. As the camera reaches the warmth of a burning barrel, the scene is momentarily bathed in orange light as two characters stand beside the flames. The perspective then shifts from the sand into shallow ocean water, gliding past the massive, dark silhouette of a roller coaster framework. Finally, the environment opens up to the illuminated beachfront, where the camera wades toward the bright green neon signage of the Los Santos buildings and a line of parked cars with glowing headlights.
